title: pericallis lanata var. lanata
intro: Pericallis lanata var. lanata, also known as the 'White Velvet Plant', is a succulent plant species native to the Canary Islands, characterized by its velvety white leaves and vibrant yellow flowers. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and promoting relaxation due to its calming effects, as well as helping to regulate blood pressure and improve overall cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Pericallis lanata var. lanata include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
